title: beating SEELE
wikitext:
[]: beating SEELE             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Feb 01, 2008 6:48 pm Over the years of Eva fandom a lot of people have deluded themselves into think NERV could have won in EoE. I am going to crush this myth once and for all. THERE IS ABSOLUTELY NO WAY THEY COULD WIN! Lets review all the facts shall we. 1. NERV has been branded terrorists that want to destroy the world. It is just them against all the worlds governments. 2. As such they are completely isolated and will not be getting any supplies for repairs nor reinforcements. This means it's only a matter of time before everything breaks down. It also means it is only a matter of time before they don't have the personel to run the place. 3. All the data on SEELE was erased so they have no proof to use against them even if they could get someone to hear them out. 4. Even if you kill the Harpies SEELE is still out there and will just make more until they suceed. Their tactics were flawless, they had won from the very start. It was only a matter of time. The whole battle was meaningless because it could never hope to acomplish anything but delaying them. They had the highground and used to to devastating effect. The only real choices people had that day were give in , die , or hijack their plans . Yui, unlike us with our narrowmindedness saw the truth and did the only thing possible to beat them as shitty a solution as it was. So please no more speculation on what would have stopped them that day. Time to face facts it was a war that could not be won by normal means.

[]: Re: beating SEELE             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Feb 01, 2008 6:56 pm Nerv could never have held out against the JSSDF forever. And what is all this junk? And why the shouting? Anonymous_Evafan wrote: 1. NERV has been branded terrorists that want to destroy the world. It is just them against all the worlds governments.

[]: Re: beating SEELE             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Feb 01, 2008 7:04 pm UrsusArctos wrote: Where did this come from?

[]: Re: beating SEELE             Quote Post by BobBQ » Fri Feb 01, 2008 7:08 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: The only people that know are the co-conspiritors and they have no reason to turn on them.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Feb 01, 2008 7:10 pm I'm sick of people saying Shinji could have stopped SEELE. He couldn't no matter how much you want NGE to be a cliche anime.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Fri Feb 01, 2008 7:18 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: I'm sick of people saying Shinji could have stopped SEELE. He couldn't no matter how much you want NGE to be a cliche anime.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Feb 01, 2008 7:30 pm Everyone here is forgetting Gendo and Rei getting cozy in the basement. Between them, they are the ones who push the big red button labelled "Instrumentality Now"

[]: Re: beating SEELE             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Feb 01, 2008 8:02 pm UrsusArctos wrote: Anonymous_Evafan wrote: 1. NERV has been branded terrorists that want to destroy the world. It is just them against all the worlds governments.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Feb 01, 2008 8:21 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Everyone here is forgetting Gendo and Rei getting cozy in the basement. Between them, they are the ones who push the big red button labelled "Instrumentality Now"

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Sat Feb 02, 2008 2:22 am ...and take Eva 01.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Feb 02, 2008 2:44 am What would Yui gain by doing that? Fighting a conventional battle never seemed plausible to her. As long as SEELE exists nothing will ever be solved and hundreds, if not thousands more innocent people will die for their mad dreams.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Feb 02, 2008 3:38 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Which makes the whole thing even more pointless.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sat Feb 02, 2008 10:03 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: As long as SEELE exists nothing will ever be solved and hundreds, if not thousands more innocent people will die for their mad dreams.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Feb 02, 2008 1:11 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Well if you don't consider "beating SEELE at their own game" as "beating SEELE"...

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sat Feb 02, 2008 1:27 pm Well I think this kind of depends on what sort of options were open to Shinji once unit 01 floated up into the sky and merged with GNR. Up until the merging Shinji had no control over what was going on at all. But after the merging he was at least given some options. Shinji decided that it might be a good idea if everyone stopped existing which is where things got out of hand. But I think the possibility of if Seele could have been beaten without third impact depends on what Shinji could do here. If Shinji could have just selectively tanged people like everyone who was out to kill them maybe this couldve been avoided. But then we don't know if he could do that. And of course he had pretty much snapped at that point so even if he could it wasn't something he would have thought to do. If I was in his shoes what I would have done is used unit 01 to tang the opposition into submission and conquer the world so that seele could be rooted out. But like I said Shinji might not have been able to do that, since its completely speculative. Maybe if he has GNR tang people its all or nothing, we really don't know exactly what his options were at that point.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Feb 02, 2008 1:31 pm I'd wager an AATF powerful enough to strip Lilin of their physical form wouldn't be small enough to be selective in who it tangs. Also, you'd have to know who your targets are.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Feb 02, 2008 1:33 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: SEELE rules the world ATM

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Feb 02, 2008 1:37 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Also, you'd have to know who your targets are.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Feb 02, 2008 1:37 pm CI wrote: 12. Seele C. Confidential Information An esoteric secret society born during the medieval Dark Ages and, originally, a religious order. Slowly but surely, they extended their influence, until at last they crushed the final forces of opposition in the mid-20th century and became a latent power with covert rule over human society .

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Sat Feb 02, 2008 1:39 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Over the years of Eva fandom a lot of people have deluded themselves into think NERV could have won in EoE. [...] I'm sick of people saying Shinji could have stopped SEELE.
